recursive_chunking.file_content:
PalmMind AI Work Culture and Policy Guidelines.
1. Working Hours: Our standard working hours are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. We offer flexible work-from-home options up to 2 days a week.
2. Leave Policy: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave, which accrues monthly.
3. Dynamic Team Roles: We build highly modular agentic systems and value rapid iteration, clean software architecture, and robust automated tests.

semantic_chunking.file_content: Introduction to PalmMind AI Core Agentic Platform. The platform leverages direct llama.cpp connections for ultra-low latency inference. This is accelerated using hardware-accelerated NVIDIA GPU passthroughs. In contrast to standard chain architectures, our systems run on dynamic LangGraph state loops. Ingestion utilizes the Snowflake Arctic-Embed-M model to embed text chunks into our Qdrant vector database. All user bookings and conversational memory checkpointers are persisted directly to local Postgres and Redis instances.

greeting.message: Hello! I am a new engineer exploring the backend. Who are you and what tools do you have?

rag_retrieval.message: Based on the uploaded documents, what are standard working hours at PalmMind, and what embedding model does the platform use?
